summary: Audience tape delivers the full 1980 Warfield show with a vivid second‑set opener and a unique China→Rider jam, but acoustic set nuances are dulled by crowd noise.
review: The audience recording provides a complete picture of this 1980 performance, letting listeners hear the beloved dreamy second‑set opener and an inventive China→Rider transition that showcases Jerry’s exploratory playing. While the room ambience and crowd response are praised, the acoustic set suffers from the typical loss of subtle detail in audience tapes.

ai_rating.rationale: The reviewer gives 4 stars, highlighting strong musical moments and a generally good listening experience despite some acoustic‑set limitations; with only one detailed review the confidence is moderate.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Room sounds great and crowd is in tune, but ambient noise masks subtle nuances of the acoustic set.

poor_songs: Acoustic set (overall affected by audience recording)
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set finally appears, featuring a unique China→Rider jam; the second set opens with a dreamy sequence that flows well and is captured nicely despite being an audience tape.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Shows Jerry trying new tactics during the China→Rider transition jam.
